subject: Payment failed
body: My payment didn't go through when I tried to upgrade my plan. Card ending in 4242 was declined.

subject: App crash on submit
body: The app crashes every time I click the submit button on the form. I'm using Chrome 120 on Windows 11.

subject: Can you add dark mode?
body: Would love to see a dark mode feature. It would be easier on the eyes for late-night work sessions.

subject: Cannot login to my account
body: I keep getting 'invalid credentials' even though I just reset my password five minutes ago.

subject: Not sure what happened
body: Something seems wrong with my account but I don't know what exactly. Maybe a settings change?

subject: Refund request for duplicate charge
body: I was charged twice for the same subscription this month. Please refund the extra $29.99.

subject: Dashboard not loading
body: The analytics dashboard shows a blank page. Console errors mention a failed API call to /metrics endpoint.

subject: Export to PDF feature
body: It would be great to export reports as PDF. CSV is fine but our management team prefers PDF format.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
body: The 2FA code from my authenticator app is always rejected. I've tried syncing the time on my phone.

subject: Invoice discrepancy
body: My latest invoice shows $149 but my plan is the $99/month tier. Can you explain the difference?

subject: Data loss after update
body: After the latest app update, all my saved projects are gone. This is critical — I had months of work there.

subject: Integration with Slack
body: Would be nice to get notifications in Slack when tasks are assigned. Any plans for a Slack integration?

subject: Account locked out
body: My account got locked after too many login attempts. I need to access it urgently for a client meeting.

subject: I think there might be an issue
body: The page loads slowly sometimes, or maybe it's my internet. Not sure if it's on your end or mine.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed unexpectedly
body: I thought I cancelled last month but I was charged again. Can I get a refund for this billing cycle?

subject: File upload fails silently
body: When I try to upload a CSV file larger than 5MB, the progress bar finishes but the file doesn't appear.

subject: Password reset email not arriving
body: I've requested a password reset three times but never received the email. Checked spam folder too.

subject: Question about team pricing
body: We're a team of 15. Do you offer volume discounts? Also, do you have an annual billing option?

subject: Maybe a bug or maybe I'm doing it wrong
body: The search seems broken but I'm not sure if I'm using the right syntax. It used to work differently I think.

subject: Mobile app improvements
body: The mobile app could really use offline mode and push notifications for task deadlines. Would improve workflow a lot.
